description_short: Waterproof mattress protector to save your mattress from dust, food and liquid stains.

construction_layers.name: Waterproof Layer
construction_layers.notes: Waterproof layer prevents liquids from seeping into the mattress.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine washable, delicate cycle, cold water.

proprietary_tech.name: Waterproof Protection Layer
proprietary_tech.description: Prevents liquids from seeping into the mattress.

proprietary_tech.name: Fitted-Sheet Style
proprietary_tech.description: Fits mattresses up to 10 inches in height.

faq_specs.question: Will it fit my mattress properly?
faq_specs.answer: It is designed to fit mattresses up to 10 inches in height, ensuring a snug and secure fit without bunching.

faq_specs.question: Will it feel uncomfortable or plastic-like?
faq_specs.answer: No, the top fabric is soft and breathable, designed to feel like a regular bedsheet while the waterproof layer sits underneath.

notes_observed: Flat pricing across all sizes (₹710). 10-year warranty (longest in lineup).
